name: fooddata-central-mcp
description: MCP server wrapping the USDA FoodData Central API — search and retrieve food nutrition data
author: PLACEHOLDER

FDC_API_KEY.description: USDA FoodData Central API key. Get a free key at https://fdc.nal.usda.gov/api-guide. Use DEMO_KEY for testing (30 req/hr limit).

tools.name: search_foods
tools.description: Search the USDA FoodData Central database by keyword or food name

tools.name: get_food
tools.description: Get full nutrient details for a single food by FDC ID

tools.name: get_foods
tools.description: Batch lookup of up to 20 foods by FDC ID

tools.name: list_foods
tools.description: Paginated browse of the FoodData Central catalog
